personal.name: Joakim Moléni
personal.title: Software Engineer — Transaction-Critical Core Banking Systems

profile: Engineer focused on high-reliability transaction processing in core banking. I work with COBOL and HLASM on IBM z/OS where correctness, operational continuity and performance under pressure are essential.

highlights: Developed and maintained transaction-critical systems handling high-volume financial flows on IBM z/OS.
Implemented core transaction logic in COBOL and HLASM for regulated financial services where correctness is non-negotiable.
Improved reliability and operational visibility across business-critical processing paths with low tolerance for downtime.
Delivered backend capabilities supporting transaction-sensitive banking processes.
Worked with integration and operations across Linux and distributed environments under production constraints.
